description: COD-AB metadata registry. One row per country-version. country_iso3 and version together form a unique key.

fields.name: country_name
fields.description: Country name in English.

fields.name: country_iso2
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. AF).

fields.name: country_iso3
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. AFG), uppercase.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Dataset version string (e.g. v01, v02).

fields.name: admin_level_full
fields.description: Highest admin level with complete national coverage. Must be less than or equal to admin_level_max.

fields.name: admin_level_max
fields.description: Deepest admin level present in the boundary data. admin_level_full must be less than or equal to this value.

fields.name: admin_1_name
fields.description: Local concept name for admin level 1 (e.g. Province). Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: admin_2_name
fields.description: Local concept name for admin level 2 (e.g. District). Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: admin_3_name
fields.description: Local concept name for admin level 3. Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: admin_4_name
fields.description: Local concept name for admin level 4. Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: admin_5_name
fields.description: Local concept name for admin level 5. Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: admin_1_count
fields.description: Number of admin level 1 units. Always present since admin_level_max is always >= 1.

fields.name: admin_2_count
fields.description: Number of admin level 2 units. Must be non-null when admin_level_max >= 2; must be null when admin_level_max < 2.

fields.name: admin_3_count
fields.description: Number of admin level 3 units. Must be non-null when admin_level_max >= 3; must be null when admin_level_max < 3.

fields.name: admin_4_count
fields.description: Number of admin level 4 units. Must be non-null when admin_level_max >= 4; must be null when admin_level_max < 4.

fields.name: admin_5_count
fields.description: Number of admin level 5 units. Must be non-null when admin_level_max >= 5; must be null when admin_level_max < 5.

fields.name: admin_notes
fields.description: Free-text notes about the administrative structure. Known deviation: may be empty string instead of null.

fields.name: date_source
fields.description: Date of the original source data.

fields.name: date_updated
fields.description: Date the dataset was last updated by the contributor.

fields.name: date_reviewed
fields.description: Date the dataset was last reviewed by OCHA.

fields.name: date_metadata
fields.description: Date the metadata record was last updated.

fields.name: date_valid_on
fields.description: Date from which this dataset version is considered valid.

fields.name: date_valid_to
fields.description: Date on which this version was superseded; null if this is the current version.

fields.name: update_frequency
fields.description: Expected update frequency of the source data in years.

fields.name: update_type
fields.description: Nature of the last update. Major updates alter administrative boundaries; minor updates are schema-compatible changes.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source organisation(s) that produced the data.

fields.name: contributor
fields.description: OCHA office or team that processed and published the dataset.

fields.name: methodology_dataset
fields.description: Description of how the dataset was produced.

fields.name: methodology_pcodes
fields.description: Description of the p-code assignment methodology. Known deviation: typically stored as empty string rather than null.

fields.name: caveats
fields.description: Caveats about data quality, coverage, or history. Known deviation: upstream source uses misspelled column name caveates which is renamed during processing.
